sections.paragraph:
Original: יוּטה יטּה

Transliteration: yûṭṭâh yûṭâh

Phonetic: yoo-taw'

BDB Definition:

Juttah = "stretched out"
  1. a town in the mountains of Judah, in the neighbourhood of Maon and Carmel; modern 'Yutta'

Origin: from H5186

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
